data.title: As a developer, fix-bug uses ast-grep for investigation pre-loading when available
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add ast-grep guidance to the fix-bug skill's Step 2 (Investigation) so agents use sg for structural pattern matching during investigation pre-loading to discover callers, importers, and source-chain dependencies of the buggy code.
**Why**: Investigation pre-loading determines the scope of the bug's impact. Structural search finds actual code references rather than string matches in comments, improving investigation accuracy.
**Scope**:
- IN: fix-bug SKILL.md Step 2 update with sg command examples for caller/importer discovery, command -v sg guard, Grep fallback instruction
- OUT: Changes to other skills, changes to gate-2b-blast-radius.sh (already has ast-grep), ast-grep pattern config files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, fix-bug SKILL.md Step 2 (Investigation) contains ast-grep guidance with a command -v sg guard and Grep fallback
  ← Satisfies: "Skills reference ast-grep in specific dependency discovery steps: fix-bug Step 2"
- When this story is complete, running fix-bug on a system without ast-grep installed produces no errors and falls back to Grep-based search
  ← Satisfies: "Graceful degradation"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] fix-bug SKILL.md already references ast-grep in the gate-2b context (line 713) — new guidance should be consistent with existing references
